title: IT service Dashboard
excerpt: I need to create a Dashboard for a new board I crated for managing IT service calls for external clients that will track statistics and open tickets. I do not see any tutorials on this anywhere. Can anyone direct me on w…

posts.author: jcarey1966 (John Carey)
posts.cookedHtml: I need to create a Dashboard for a new board I crated for managing IT service calls for external clients that will track statistics and open tickets. I do not see any tutorials on this anywhere. Can anyone direct me on where I might get some help? I have built some charts and they are ok but I want them all in one Dashboard.

posts.author: gaco.com.au (Elijah Noonan)
posts.cookedHtml: @jcarey1966 what kind of information would you like to see in your dashboard and what boards do you currently have set up that contain the service calls?
